Variables.Name: FailedPlaceMessage
Variables.Description: Message displayed in message dialog when player pawn fails to spawn because no playerstart was available.

Variables.Name: MaxedOutMessage
Variables.Description: Message when player join attempt is refused because the server is at capacity.

Variables.Name: EnteredMessage
Variables.Description: Message when a new player enters the game.

Variables.Name: LeftMessage
Variables.Description: Message when a player leaves the game.

Variables.Name: GlobalNameChange
Variables.Description: Message when a player changes his name.

Variables.Name: SpecEnteredMessage
Variables.Description: Message when a new spectator enters the server (if spectator has a player name).

Variables.Name: NewPlayerMessage
Variables.Description: Message when a new player enters the server (if player is unnamed).

Variables.Name: NewSpecMessage
Variables.Description: Message when a new spectator enters the server (if spectator is unnamed).
